rajiveutils 1.0
  • Reference

Generate null F-statistics via jackstraw permutation

Source: R/jackstraw.R
generate_null_f_stats.Rd

For each of the d features, sample n_null feature rows from X_t (with replacement), permute the sampled rows' values (breaking any association with joint_comp_scores), and compute their F-statistics.

Usage

generate_null_f_stats(X_t, joint_comp_scores, n_null)

Arguments

X_t

d x n numeric matrix (data block, transposed).

joint_comp_scores

length-n numeric vector of joint scores for one component.

n_null

positive integer; number of null F-statistics per feature.

Value

d x n_null numeric matrix of null F-statistics.

On this page
